fields.label: Text
fields.description: Hint for the front of the card

fields.label: Answer
fields.description: Optional hint for the back of the card

fields.label: Image for front of card
fields.description: Optional image for the front of the card. This image will be also displayed on the back of the card if no back card image is provided.

fields.label: Alternative text for the image on front of card
Image for back of card
fields.description: Optional image for the back of card.

fields.label: Alternative text for the image on back of card
Audio files for the front of the card
Audio files for the back of the card
Tip for text
fields.description: Tip for the front of the card

fields.label: Tip for answer
fields.description: Tip for the back of the card

semantics.label: Behavioural settings.
semantics.description: These options will let you control how the task behaves.

fields.label: Select Mode
fields.description: "Free browsing" is the default mode. In "Match" mode the user will have to pair the front and the back side of cards. In "Self Correction" mode, they will be able to guess the other side of the cards and confirm if they got it correct or not. "Match with Repetition" is a combination of the "Match" and "Self Correction" modes.

fields.label: Scale the text to fit inside the card
fields.description: Unchecking this option will make the card adapt its size to the size of the text

fields.label: Cards Background color (Front Side)
fields.description: The color of the front side of the cards background. Default is transparent rgba(0, 0, 0, 0).

fields.label: Cards Background color (Back Side)
fields.description: The color of the back side of the cards background. Default is transparent rgba(0, 0, 0, 0). If Default then the Front side colour will be used for both sides.

fields.label: Hide front card images
fields.description: Check this option if you want to hide potential front card images on cards with 2 images.

fields.label: Cards Order
fields.description: Select the order of cards displayed to the user. If "Random", and the option below is enabled, the user will be able to select the number of cards picked from the cards pool.

fields.label: Select number of cards displayed
fields.description: Allow user to select the number of cards drawn from the pool

fields.label: Display which side first?
fields.description: Select how the cards will be displayed. This option is mostly useful if the front of the cards is not really a question

fields.label: Display which side on the left?
fields.description: Select which side of the cards will be displayed on the left

options.label: Display the front side on the left
Display the back side on the left

fields.label: Maximum Score
fields.description: Maximum score to give the user upon finishing this activity. Set this field to 0 (zero) is no score is given.

fields.label: Penalty percentage
fields.description: Each extra round (in Self-correction mode) or each wrong match (in Match mode) will cost the user this percentage of the maximum score. Enter 0 for NO penalty. Maximum penalty is 50(%). Do NOT enter the % sign in the box.

semantics.label: Tutorial and Examples: Papi Jo's Drupal test site
semantics.description: █

semantics.label: Text for "Round" message below cards and on the summary screen
semantics.description: @round will be replaced by the number of the current round

semantics.label: Text for "round(s)" message on the summary screen
semantics.description: @rounds will be replaced by the total number of rounds

semantics.label: Text for "Cards left" message
semantics.description: @number will be replaced by the number of cards left in this round

semantics.label: Text for the "next round" button
semantics.description: @round will be replaced by the round number

semantics.label: Text for the "Match" button
semantics.description: Used in Match mode to label the button which the user will press to indicate a potential match

semantics.label: Text for the "Correct match" message
semantics.description: Used in Match mode

semantics.label: Text for the "Incorrect match" message
semantics.description: Used in Match mode

semantics.label: Text for the current number of Correct / Incorrect matches message
semantics.description: @correct and @incorrect will be replaced by the current number of correct/incorrect matches

semantics.label: Label for the number of correct matches in the Summary
semantics.description: Used at the end of a Match mode session

semantics.label: Label for the number of incorrect matches in the Summary
semantics.description: Used at the end of a Match mode session

semantics.label: Feedback message used in the Summary
semantics.description: Used at the end of a Match mode session

semantics.label: Text for the "show summary" button to the Final Page
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Title text for the summary page for each round
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Text for "Cards you got right:"
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Text for "Cards you got wrong:"
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Text for "Overall Score"
semantics.description: Used in Match and Self-correction modes

semantics.label: Text for "Cards completed"
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Text for "Selected Cards"
semantics.description: This number will be displayed if the user did not select ALL the cards available in the stack.
semantics.default: Number of cards you selected from the pool:

semantics.label: Text for "Completed rounds:"
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode

semantics.label: Message when all cards have been learned
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction mode. @cards will be replaced by the number of all cards in the pool.
semantics.default: Well done! You got all @cards cards correct!

semantics.label: Score explanation for self-correction and Match with Repetition modes IF a penalty percent has been set.
semantics.description: Used in Self-correction AND Match with Repetition modes. @penalty will be replaced by the penalty percentage applied
semantics.default: Each extra round cost you a penalty of @penalty%.

semantics.label: Match mode score explanation if a penalty percent has been set.
semantics.description: Used in Match mode @penalty will be replaced by the penalty percentage applied
semantics.default: Each incorrect match cost you a penalty of @penalty%.

semantics.label: Progress text
semantics.description: Available variables are @card and @total.

semantics.label: Label for card text
semantics.description: Used for accessibility by assistive technologies

semantics.label: Label for card back
semantics.description: Used for accessibility by assistive technologies

semantics.label: Label for the show tip button
Audio not supported message
semantics.default: Your browser does not support this audio

semantics.label: Display the cards in random order?
semantics.description: Ask the user if they want to display the cards in random order.
semantics.default: Display the cards in random order?

semantics.label: Display the cards on the right in random order?
semantics.description: Ask the user if they want to display the cards on the right in random order. Note: the cards on the left are always randomized.
semantics.default: Display the cards on the right in random order?

semantics.label: Current order notice
semantics.description: Shows the user which order they have selected to display the cards (normal or random).

semantics.label: Number of Cards
semantics.description: If the cards are displayed in random order, ask the user how many cards they want.
semantics.default: How many cards do you want?

semantics.label: Textual representation of the score explanation button
Notice to ask the user if they want to switch from the current way that the side of the cards is displayed first to the reverse side.
semantics.description: @side will be replaced by the reverse side.
semantics.default: Switch the current display mode of card sides to @side?

semantics.label: Label used to tell the user which side of the cards is currently displayed first.
Label used to tell the user the order in which the cards on the right are currently displayed.
semantics.default: Current Order mode of Cards on the right =

semantics.label: Notice to ask the user if they want to switch from the current way that the side of the cards is displayed on the left to the reverse side.
semantics.default: Switch the current display mode of Left card side to @side?

semantics.label: Label used to tell the user which side of the cards is currently displayed on the left.
